notes: Cross-service / shared-library culprit. The culprit (48ad9c8) is NOT on the loud failing service: it edits the SHARED TSO client lib pkg/tso/client/casretry.go, dropping DefaultCASRetryPolicy.MaxAttempts from 8 to 2 (and removing the backoff sleep). Its message ('Simplify shared TSO client backoff helper') names no fault. olapdb-tso links this shared lib and was deployed at 14:30 carrying the change. Under TSO leader-election churn the FoundationDB CAS compare-and-swap on the timestamp key now exhausts its 2-attempt budget and the txn times out (fault signature: trace error 'CAS retry budget exhausted', metric tso_cas_retry_exhausted_total and fdb_txn_timeout_total climb from 14:36) -> olapdb-tso cannot issue commit timestamps -> olapdb-server CnchLock acquire times out -> stream-taskmanager Flink job Metric_threshold_monitoring_job restarts and platform-api metadata queries 5xx. Onset ~14:36 is ~6min after the 14:30 deploy (budget only exhausts under leader-election churn). TEMPTING WRONG ANSWERS: (1) fdbbb04 -- an olapdb-tso commit touching olapdb/src/TSO/TSOServer.cpp that is the LATEST deploy on the loud failing service (14:35, right before onset), but its diff is leader-election logging only (LOG_DEBUG->LOG_INFO), causally inert; (2) d4100be dashboard-svc chart-cache TTL bump deployed at onset, unrelated. Only 48ad9c8's diff implements the CAS-retry mechanism the signature names.
